name: Fresh Broccoli and Red Pepper Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 large red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a small nonstick skillet with cooking spray and add oil.
2. Add onion and garlic to the skillet, cook over low heat for about five minutes until soft.
3. Transfer the mixture to a mixing bowl.
4. Add broccoli florets and chopped broccoli stems (coarsely) to the bowl.
5. Shred mozzarella cheese and stir in peppers, cheeses (provolone and parmesan), flour, salt, and pepper.
6. Divide the mixture evenly over two deep-dish crusts.
7. Place pizzas on the lower shelves of a preheated oven at 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until the crusts are golden brown.
